Here's that we know which five keywords we want to be focusing on for here Here's this page. We know the two keywords we're focusing here. Here's this page We know the three whatever it is now the second step now is the off site So here's now all the things we're gonna be doing back to these pages to get those pages ranked high for the ones we want okay Now with off site stuff all we're basically talking about in reality is pretty much is link building okay Back prior pretty Google the way that the internet works is that search engines categorize things all sorts of weird ways Nobody really knew what you know how to find things and it's always just never really worked that good Google when they came out their big algorithm change it was like that changed the whole world and why they're as big as they are right now They basically made their algorithm based off of the popularity contest They said the more people that are linking to a certain site that means that sites really really good So we're gonna rank them higher okay, and that's what how this whole their whole algorithm came about That's how Google became Google was that okay, so they so in theory all you do is go look at a website see how many links This guy had he has a thousand links to side if I get a thousand one I just beat him out. That's basically the whole process now Luckily for Google they had people like us who learned the algorithm very quickly and we started manipulating it and then they Had to figure out other ways to make it better So we just go out there and get a billion links overnight from any site we could and all of a sudden You know we're ranked number one and people are angry because we manipulate the results So Google's obviously gotten really smart over the years, which is why you always hear about all the panda update happened Oh and this update happened this change over here And what Google is trying to look for like what they really want is they want organic happy real things happening okay, and so That's what they're always looking for is is is you know, what's organic? What's real and so because of that? You know the core system is still the same the core thing is still what's your on-site presence is the page optimized right and second off Who's linking to it now? They do a lot of things now looking like are the sites that are linked this are they relevant Okay, if I own if this side over here that how to make money and some guy on a pig websites linking to me But that's not a relevant link So we're gonna excuse me we're in discount the value of that link so start at assigning value to link to different links So the better the better the link was the better site is coming from the higher value to get you and more points to getting that How push you up higher so now instead of just you need a thousand links We need a thousand links that are higher quality than the other guys thousand links Okay, and so you're starting to hear me more of that and it's always it's always evolving and changing but the core is pretty much the same It's looking to how many good quality links are pointing back into your interior site Okay, so when you know that basically it comes back down to how do I get a whole bunch of really high good quality links coming back to my website? Okay, and you understand that that's basically the process you go into Google and you can look at other people's sites See how many sites are linking back to them and figure out? Okay, this guy's got you know a thousand links I know I need to get you know around a thousand links or so If I if I do I'm gonna be pretty much close to the same ballpark as this person Okay, and then you know what kind of where how much work you have in for you Okay, and we're really quick before we jump into some some of the big like how to get links The one big thing you're seeing happening right now It's gonna be happening more and more over the next year to two or three years Is the role of social media inside of linking because Google all these people that used to be based off of just the backlinks now They're basing it off not just the backlinks But how many people actually care about the content you're producing so things like tweeting And Facebook and it takes you know take but think book think book Facebook What those things called likes likes? Google pluses all those things while they seem kind of cheesy and dorky those things are gonna be playing a bigger and a bigger And a bigger role in the future in fact right now I think Google actually got in trouble for this they had to stop doing it But for a while if you were logged into your Google to your to your Google account while you were searching You saw completely different results and everyone saw different results You saw different results based off of the people that you liked on Facebook Twitter link dollars in the social sites you started seeing Results based on what they were liking and thumbs-uping. Do you guys know that? It's really interesting Okay, I think they did get some trouble though because of something but um so that's happening more and more where The social part is gonna be gonna be so much more important than ever has in the past So make sure in your strategy you're looking at that you're figuring out how our ways I can get people to come and like my pages and thumbs up and all those type of things because Those are gonna be I said more more valuable the longer you're doing it You know using solo ads for things like that is smart one thing Mike Geary is telling us He does on his pages is before he launches a new article out to his list He puts up the article on his site and then he goes and he buys some really cheap traffic from like third world countries and drive that page Incentivize them to like the page he gets like a 30 40 50,000 likes on the page Then he sends his own list to it people show up There's 50,000 likes already and all of a sudden, you know, man This is a good thing people start passing around it causes that momentum to start happening Okay, so he does that by getting really cheap traffic and incentivizing we're trying to get them to start doing that It starts this whole this whole cycle so same thing I think you should be doing with your list or we do with pages You're creating is how can we get people to start liking this? How can we get people to pass it along and just anyway We're creating that start thinking about that kind of stuff because that is gonna be so much more valuable more important as we keep You know the whole evolutions that are happening online Okay, that's that's the big reason why I'm so excited about social media now Where I didn't used to care as much as just because it's playing such a big role in it You know if I can get hundred thousand people like my page plus fifty thousand backlinks, you know, you're gonna be able to dominate for for everyone Okay, so now let's talk about some strategies to get backlinks because there's a lot of really good strategy We spend you know week and a half just talking about backlinking strategies I'm gonna show you the core ones that we're using right now, and I still think they're the best Okay, the first one on page number 66 In fact, there's my picture on page number 66. I forgot to put it in there See make money boom.com secrets is number one under the sponsored ad that exciting Because me excited. I don't know about you guys Okay, um So about a year ago we put out a product called rent and edu.com and There are so much controversy about this is shocked me. I cannot believe that there was controversy about something this simple and this easy Anyway works fantastic we stopped selling because people were so angry about it And we're just open it up again probably I'm January because it was work so like screwed our care people in great works So this is the whole concept of rent and edu. Here's Members of me talking about that before okay this like it's still like most of our backlinks that got us number one for make money We're from this strategy. So screw everyone who's watching now who didn't believe it actually works because it works, okay? So the concept called link bait you guys ever heard of link bait before okay, so link bait is basically I'm trying to do things to get people to want to link to me So the most simple simplistic type of link bait is you post a really really good article it gets people to want to link to you Right there were some guys that started making these really cool widgets like one of them was See how much caffeine you have in your blood and it's a little like coffee cup You have to click as fast as you can for a minute and it pops up and saying okay You're you're a caffeine rate is you know, whatever it's some crazy thing and it's like copy this to your blog So all your friends can see what your caffeine rate is like copy and paste this little widget to their blog and boom on under the widget There's a link pointing back to that guy's site, okay, and there's this guy In the dating industry that built like 50 or 60s little widgets like little fun games like that And he had people millions of people posting on his these on their blog and everyone's back linking to him from all sorts of sites He was ranking for this just like hyper competitive keywords Okay, so that's what kind of a link bait is so one of my friends named Paul Lynch who lives in the UK He came to me with this strategy that was just brilliant Link making link baiting strategy with an edu site now edu sites obviously people like us We can't just go buy a dot edu you have to be Like a college to be able to get an edu type site And so he did he has a whole company down in the Philippines He works with all the colleges down in the Philippines or not Philippines in Peru And so he did a bunch work them in he basically went to these these these schools and said hey There's no way I can get an edu site for me worked the government He got I don't like 15 or 20 of these dot edu sites. So you take the dot edu site right here And then he would go on He'd go to Google or go to whatever he find the list the top 10 people for whatever key already wanted So like let's say it was make money or you know work from home Whatever a keyword he wanted to type that in and he go contact all these different people that were already on page I'm going to Google and it's basically hey, we see your number one on you know, you're on page one right now I own a dot edu site over here. It's a Peruvian education site And obviously you know that education sites are really hard to get links from but I'd really give links So I'm I'm willing to give you two or three or five links To to any website you want in exchange for you give me one link back to my website And that was the link bait and he started going to people and the people were like, yeah, sure I'd love a bunch of edu sites. So what happened is So you take the edu site he'd contact these people Basically, he would then link to that person site that person linked to his site and he get ranked really high now What was interesting is when he was doing this? In fact, if you go to Google type and make money look at the top probably 30 results or so You'll see the most those people were linking back to my site It's the reason why I was able to get to number one in Google so fast for make money Is because all the other people who rate for make money very relevant sites are linking back to me and they're linking back to me Because they wanted all the different links from the edu site that makes sense Okay, so that's that was our whole edu linking strategy now Like I said, it works great people were so people I just watched a video My wife sister typed my name into YouTube and saw this video this guy talking trash about me during Thanksgiving So I want to watch the video It's this guy who watched the sales video for edu and then he wrote his whole video about how to scam artists because he didn't Find a single edu link pointing back to my site. I can send about it Yeah, basically you could you take an article and you spin it so you take you know, let's say it's hi My name is Russell Brunson and I like to eat Sushi on the beach so that's my article, right? And I create those spin tags like around sushi and around the beach and things like that and I push a little button on software It'll take those words and it finds a synonym for those words and it flips it out and rotates it around So we'll rewrite the article hundreds and thousands of times or it's the same article, but like it's just from a from a contextual standpoint looks different to Google it's a different article because Beach and oh, you know, whatever Yeah, sure are different words, but look, you know, it's the same thing, but it's a different different words So then you take you take this article you go on the site You post it and every single time it submits it will spend the article resubmit it spin it resubmit it spin it Resubmit it so you basically get again, you know 100 a thousand different links coming back from unique articles pointing back to your site.
